channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress here, 2nd March
item.description:
Please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Desk dumped on pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Please remove desk dumped outside 68/70 Roding Road. Partially blocking pavement access.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roding Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins cracked paving , parking and litter unsightly close to a busy bus stop, 2nd March
item.description:
Since these businesses have arrived in Welling, they have continuously used the pavements for everything. More cars are coming up on to the pavements and it is sometimes an obstacle course to walk on the pavement to get to the bus stop. The bins are always an eyesore. Anyone visiting Welling from coming down the road from the station doesn’t get a nice impression. I’ve lived here for years and these shops have certainly brought the area down.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Central Avenue, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders’ Materials Dumped, 2nd March
item.description:
Please remove the builder”s materials and rubbish next to the BT box outside the barbers at the Homerton High Street end of Roding Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plants overhanging onto pavement in maxwell road, 2nd March
item.description:
Res wanting to report that there's plants growing from number 46 faraday road onto the pavement in maxwell road. This is causing an issue with people with wheelchairs as its head hight and they are having to go on the other side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maxwell Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to the flares 17-23 Benthal Road in the alleyway with all the bins and bike shack, 2nd March
item.description:
Yesterday a man in a van dumped all his commercial waste into that space, he was stopped by police but nothing was done and he wasn’t told off or asked to remove the stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benthal Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks and car part's over the paravent due to a car crash which happen on Saturday 21st Feb 00.30 am., 2nd March
item.description:
Bricks and car part's over the paravent due to a car crash which happen on Saturday 21st Feb 00.30 am.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on comercial bin, 2nd March
item.description:
Non-offensive graffiti of blue spray on blue bin, outside 110 Anerley Road. Approx. 15cm by 30cm big.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108-110, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 2nd March
item.description:
Dead fox to be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Luxfield Road, Middle Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Tree outside my proerty is starting to rot, pieces are falling onto the footpath, 2nd March
item.description:
The tree has been pruned, along with others in the street. No notice taken on rotting trunk and the potential consequence of falling pieces of tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Poverest Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches overhang at face height, 2nd March
item.description:
Tree branches at no.51 overhang onto pavement and are at face height.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynwood Grove, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti & flyposting on all sides of phone boxes outside of Tesco Express, 72 Anerley Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Graffiti & flyposting on all sides of phone boxes outside of Tesco Express, 72 Anerley Road. Non-offensive graffiti of white and black pen/spray approximately 50cm by 30cm (per piece) on each side of the phone boxes. Additional flyposting on all sides of phone boxes too. The graffiti and flyposting could be dealt with the council, but I have also reported this to BT/OpenReach via email. For which I will attach the rfrence (if any) when I recive one.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72-78, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on cheddington rd, 2nd March
item.description:
It's there as are a number of other smaller ones

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cheddington Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 2nd March
item.description:
This was reported to be dumped over the weekend. Location 37 Middleton Road a joining corner to Celandine Drive

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 2nd March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council William Saville House Rubbish Bins area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denmark Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: 28, 2nd March
item.description:
Would like to enquire when this existing felled tree will be replaced as part of spring planting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Richborough Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on pedestrian crossing, outside 100 Anerley Road, 2nd March
item.description:
There is a pot hole on the pedestrian crossing outside 100 Anerley Road, in the southbound lane. Has been present for about a month. Aprox 30cm across, 45cm long, 5cm deep. Please see to photos attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
